reasoning: The control AC-24(2) focuses on enforcing access control decisions without relying on user or process identity. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that roles and permissions are appropriately set to prevent overly permissive access. This involves ensuring no cluster-wide administrative privileges are granted unnecessarily, enforcing least privilege principles, and managing service account tokens to prevent unauthorized access.
title: Access Control Decisions - Access control decisions | no user or process identity enforce access control de
